sourceNotes: Phase 2 Sikinos low cleanup 2026-05-28: Exploring Greece supports Agios Panteleimonas as a Sikinos beach reached by a marked 500 m/10 min path, with pebbles, large stones, rocky seabed, normal depth, and no organization. Cycladia supports boat/path access and limited natural shade from a small cave. No live condition claim was encoded.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Sikinos low cleanup 2026-05-28: Discover Greece supports Dialiskari as a Sikinos beach accessible by car with tamarisk shade. Exploring Greece and Travelfind support dirt-road car access, sand plus small pebbles, tamarisk shade, normal depth, and no organization. Unsupported asphalt, shallow-water, parking, cafe, and taverna claims were removed. No live condition claim was encoded.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Sikinos low cleanup 2026-05-28: AllOverGreece supports Santorineika as two small southeastern Sikinos coves with pebble shore, no organization, no shade, and boat/path access. Cycladia supports two pebbled rocky bays on southern Sikinos, reached by boat or a longer path, with rocky coast/seabed and not family-oriented. No live condition claim was encoded.
